task_completion.description: The agent opened the integration manual to read the required specifications.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (e.g., gedit, nano) or terminal window displaying the contents of /home/ga/Documents/QGC/integration_manual.txt.

task_completion.description: The agent opened QGroundControl and navigated to the Parameters setup menu.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The QGroundControl application is open, and the 'Parameters' tab is selected within the Vehicle Setup menu (gear icon).

task_completion.description: The agent configured the Precision Landing (PLND) parameters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The QGroundControl parameter list shows PLND_ENABLED set to 1 and PLND_TYPE set to 2. These values may be highlighted or visible in the search/filter results.

task_completion.description: The agent configured the Rangefinder (RNGFND1) parameters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The QGroundControl parameter list shows RNGFND1_TYPE set to 20, RNGFND1_MAX_CM set to 1500, RNGFND1_MIN_CM set to 20, and RNGFND1_ORIENT set to 25.

task_completion.description: The agent configured the LAND_SPEED parameter.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The QGroundControl parameter list shows LAND_SPEED set to 10.

task_completion.description: The agent initiated the parameter export process in QGroundControl.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As', 'Export', or 'Save Parameters' file dialog is open within the QGroundControl application.

task_completion.description: The agent saved the parameter backup to the correct file path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The file save dialog shows the directory as /home/ga/Documents/QGC/ and the filename as plnd_backup.params, OR a terminal/file manager window shows the plnd_backup.params file successfully created in that directory.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual QGroundControl GUI to modify parameters.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the QGroundControl interface being actively used to search and modify parameters, rather than just terminal commands.

integrity.description: The agent exported the parameters using QGroundControl's built-in tool.
integrity.visual_evidence: The QGroundControl 'Save to file' or parameter export dialog should be visible, proving the file was generated by the application.

integrity.description: The agent did not manually type out the .params file in a text editor to bypass the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no screenshots showing a text editor (like nano, vim, or gedit) being used to manually write the contents of plnd_backup.params.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The integration manual is located at /home/ga/Documents/QGC/integration_manual.txt. The required parameter values are: PLND_ENABLED=1, PLND_TYPE=2, RNGFND1_TYPE=20, RNGFND1_MAX_CM=1500, RNGFND1_MIN_CM=20, RNGFND1_ORIENT=25, LAND_SPEED=10. The final parameter backup must be exported exactly to /home/ga/Documents/QGC/plnd_backup.params.
